key_learnings: When building complex autonomous loops with @google/genai and LangGraph, explicitly restrict retrieval bounds (e.g. vertexRagStore topK 1) to prevent Context Bloat.
Ensure prompt instructions explicitly enforce concise, 'State-Only' payloads in subsequent chain hops.
Always capture response.usageMetadata.promptTokenCount to track hidden financial costs.
outcomes.patterns_observed: Vertex AI unified SDK caching is critical for repeated multi-hop agent requests, effectively solving the input token bloat.
